title: Simple Chess
description: A simple datapack, adding a chess board you can play on.
body:
## This Datapack adds Chess Boards to play with!

**WARNING: Creating to many Chess Boards may lag your world!**

To create a Chess Board you must craft it using polished diorite, polished blackstone and one gold block.

The Chess Pieces can be moved on any field but making illegal moves will display particles and play a sound.

Moving a pawn all the way to the enemies side will let you choose a chess piece to promote it to.

When you left click the base of the chess boards table, it will be dropped as an item and disappear.
